text:
The options file :

# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# Options for libgd-2.3.0,1
_OPTIONS_READ=libgd-2.3.0,1
_FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=PNG JPEG WEBP TIFF FREETYPE FONTCONFIG RAQM XPM ICONV
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=PNG
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=JPEG
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=WEBP
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=TIFF
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=FREETYPE
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=FONTCONFIG
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=RAQM
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=XPM
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=ICONV
